title: euodia lepta var. cambodiana
intro: Euodia lepta var. cambodiana, also known as Cambodian Euodia or Cambodian Wintergreen, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in Cambodia and southern China. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, attributed to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Euodia lepta var. cambodiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the leaves are dried and used in herbal remedies or as a spice.
